title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce app with cart, product display, login, register, and admin dashboard. Built with React and Node.js.

title: Cryptocurrency Coin API Service
description: RESTful API service for retrieving real-time cryptocurrency data including prices, market trends, order information.

title: Online Bookstore Platform
description: Full-stack web application for an online bookstore featuring product catalog, shopping cart, order management, and user authentication. Built with Laravel and MySQL, with an admin dashboard for managing books, categories, and transactions.
